zh.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty於大約1445年出生在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪時，他的父親Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty57歲，母親Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes20歲。他和Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1504年8月25日在他的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

zh-hans.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: 苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty于大约1445年出生在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪可洛馬迪时，他的父亲Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty57岁，母亲Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes20岁。他和Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1504年8月25日在他的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰可洛馬迪夏爾可洛馬迪。

nameMeanings.name: Urquhart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Ross and Cromarty): habitational name from any of various places in Scotland so called, notably the barony of Urquhart (Inverness), or places in Ross and Cromarty, Morayshire, and Fife. All are thought to derive from Pictish ar ‘on, by’ + Pictish carden ‘enclosure’ or ‘wood, copse’. Some bearers of this name trace their descent from William de Urchard, who fought for Robert the Bruce between 1297 and 1328.

variants.name: Orcutt
meanings: English (Staffordshire): perhaps a much altered form of Scottish   Urquhart  .

variants.name: Orchard
meanings: topographic or occupational name from residence near (or perhaps employment at) an orchard, Middle English orchard (Old English ortgeard, orceard).

habitational name from any of the places called Orchard. Those in Devon and Somerset are named from Old English ortgeard, orceard (a compound of wort, wyrt ‘plant’ (later associated with Latin hortus ‘garden’) + geard ‘yard, enclosure’), while East and West Orchard near Shaftesbury in Dorset derive from Primitive Welsh ar ‘beside, in front of, facing’ + ced ‘wood’.
rare variant of Scottish   Urquhart  . Compare   Orahood  .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty was born about 1445, in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty, was 57 and his mother, Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. He died on 25 August 1504, in his hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty est né environ 1445, à Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. Il est décédé le 25 août 1504, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty um 1445 in Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty 57 und seine Mutter Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes 20. Er hatte mit Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. August 1504 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty è nato il circa 1445 nel Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. Morì il 25 agosto 1504, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Scotland: スコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイ
ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromartyが約1445年にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイクロマルトイで生まれた時，父Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromartyは57歳，母Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbesは20歳であった。彼はKatherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlaterとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1504年8月25日に故郷で60歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドクロマルトイシュアイアクロマルトイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1504년 8월 25일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 크로마티실르 크로마티에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. Ele faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1504, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty родился около 1445 г. в местности кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. Он умер 25 августа 1504 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности кромерти, кромертишир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Urquhart 6th of Cromarty nació aproximadamente 1445, en Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Urquhart 4th of Cromarty, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Susanna-nic-Alexander Forbes of Forbes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Katherine Ogilvy of Deskford and Findlater. Murió el 25 de agosto de 1504, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Cromarty, Cromartyshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
